text:
BOTTOM LINE — Small caps edged large, metals rallied amid ceasefire hopes, staples defensive.
SPY/QQQ records held despite futures dip; small caps IJR/IWM outperformed by 0.02pp on resilient earnings, Iran stability per Reuters/Fox. Positioning shows elevated SPY PCR_vol 3.35 signaling protection amid hawkish CPI 3.32%.

INDICES — VIX 18.0 down 3.34%.
IJR +0.19%, IWM +0.18%, SPY +0.17%, IJH +0.07%, QQQ +0.05%, DIA -0.08%. Small > large by 0.02pp. Oil USO +1.75% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — SPY vol_ratio 0.5x losing, QQQ no explicit ratio.
IJH/RSP gaining attention at 0.7x amid small cap lead; SPY/DIA ignored at 0.5x/0.4x signals low-conviction grind higher. XLC/XLP vol up 0.8x despite price mixed = accumulation watch.

SECTORS — XLF Financials +0.76%, XLC Comms +0.23%, XLK Technology +0.22%, XLI Industrials +0.02%, XLU Utilities +0.02%, XLE Energy -0.18%, XLB Materials -0.27%, XLV Healthcare -0.50%, XLY Discretionary -0.72%, XLRE Real Estate -0.78%, XLP Staples -1.07%.
MSOS +10.04%, URA +2.51% top; JETS -1.81%, GDX -1.85% bottom.

THE 7s — New Metals 7 +1.86% (MP strongest +2.5%, ALB weakest -0.1%), Bank 7 +1.14% (BLK +2.1%, AIG -1.34%), Mag 7 +0.65% (GOOG +1.2%, semis split), Freight 7 +0.28%, Cloud 7 +0.27%.
Old Metals 7 -1.88% (ALB -0.1% strongest, XME split), Health 7 -1.11%, Fab 7 -1.03%, Housing 7 -0.67%, Buildout 7 -0.57%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — FOMC Apr 29 hold 100% per CME; Hawk 6 (Cook, Kashkari et al) vs Neutral 5, Dove 4.
USD stress 61/100 Elevated, Reserve Scarcity 97th percentile most stressed. TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 3.35 elevated protection, skew +9.1% fear; spot 7173.9 above GEX_flip 723.
QQQ PCR_vol 2.29 high, skew +11.6%; VIX 18.0 below 20d MA 20.9 complacency. MOVE 68.4 below MA76.4 low bond stress.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil USO/UNG +1.75% despite Iran hopes decoupled from energy XLE -0.18%.
Gold GLD -0.78% amid dollar UUP -0.11% ease, unusual vs risk-on.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 60.6 Greed.
Top movers MSOS +10.04% industries, MP +2.5% metals, URA +2.51% industries. 20d momentum XLK +23.59% best sector, Semi 7 +51.11% best basket; XLE -9.26% worst sector, Energy 7 -7.43% worst. QCOM 3.9x vol +0.95% Semi 7 accumulation.

WATCH — QCOM +0.95%, 3.9x vol spike near Semi 7 gamma. AIG -1.34%, 3.0x vol Insurance 7 distribution. MSOS +10.04%, industry lead momentum break.
